title: Macrame Feather Wall Art
excerpt: Create stunning decorative feathers using macrame techniques for unique wall decor.

steps.title: Create the spine
steps.description: Twist several cords together tightly or use wire wrapped in cord for the center.

steps.title: Add the barbs
steps.description: Cut short pieces of cord and attach along the spine using lark's head knots.

steps.title: Shape the feather
steps.description: Comb out all the attached cords and trim into a feather shape.

steps.title: Finish and stiffen
steps.description: Apply fabric stiffener and shape until dry for a lasting form.

tips: Make feathers in varying sizes for a stunning arrangement
Try dip-dyeing the ends in natural dyes for an ombre effect
